persona_pain: Data chaos and untracked touches make it impossible to prove what's working or govern the team
persona_blurb: You own the stack and the data. Every untracked touch is attribution you'll never recover. You care about owner routing, approval workflows, HubSpot data hygiene, and whether this creates compliance risk or solves it. These plays give you the governance layer, the attribution reports, and the team-wide setup plays that turn individual reps' outreach into a measurable, auditable revenue motion.

recipes.name: HubSpot Workflow trigger — team-wide LinkedIn flows
recipes.outcome: Use HubSpot lifecycle changes as triggers for LinkedIn outreach flows at scale across your team

recipes.name: Social engager setup for team
recipes.outcome: Configure warm-engager signal capture and flows so the whole team benefits from content engagement

recipes.name: Website visitor play
recipes.outcome: Turn pricing/demo/product-page visits into LinkedIn touches while intent is active

recipes.name: Govern and audit AI SDR daily queues
recipes.outcome: Review, QA, and monitor team-wide AI SDR daily queues before and after launch, including 10/15 daily caps and approval workflow

recipes.name: Team-wide slipped lead recovery
recipes.outcome: Identify dormant pipeline across all reps from HubSpot signals and prepare approved reactivation queues.

recipes.name: Closed-lost reengagement — team-wide
recipes.outcome: Re-engage closed-lost deals with no engagement for 60+ days across all reps

recipes.name: HubSpot Workflow build with FirstTouch actions
recipes.outcome: Coach through adding FT action cards (Enroll / View Profile / Connect) in HubSpot Automation UI

recipes.name: Event plays — pre-invite and post-follow-up
recipes.outcome: Build audience and invite flow before an event, then run follow-up flows to attendees and no-shows

recipes.name: Customer thank-you
recipes.outcome: Reach out when a customer hits a milestone — deepen the relationship before you need a favor
